eventGroup.Name: eventGroup
eventGroup.Description: Select which group of events to configure this bar for

eventType.Name: eventType
eventType.Description: Select which event to count totals for - must belong to the eventGroup above

eventCountType.Name: eventCountType
eventCountType.Description: How to count the totals. For all events, Count is the default. For OrderLike events, Sum will be sum of items instead of order count

includeSimulated.Name: includeSimulated
includeSimulated.Description: Include simulated test data or not in counts

valuePrefix.Name: valuePrefix
valuePrefix.Description: Prefix for the values, such as USD

valueSuffix.Name: valueSuffix
valueSuffix.Description: Suffix for the values, such as Pts

formatWithCommas.Name: formatWithCommas
formatWithCommas.Description: Display numbers with a well formatted comma

goalOffset.Name: goalOffset
goalOffset.Description: Offset current count/sum by this amount

goalText.Name: goalText
goalText.Description: What text to display in the bar, if any
